title: Pad Thai
instructions: Soak noodles in warm water until soft.
Stir fry shrimp with garlic and oil.
Add noodles and season with fish sauce and tamarind paste.
Toss with bean sprouts and top with peanuts.

title: Thai Green Curry
instructions: Simmer curry paste with coconut milk.
Add vegetables and cook until tender.
Season with soy sauce and fresh basil.

title: Lemongrass Seafood Soup
instructions: Bring stock to a boil with lemongrass.
Add shrimp and mushrooms, cook until shrimp turns pink.
Season with fish sauce to taste.
